brandDescription: Tata Motors is a leading Indian automotive manufacturer known for innovative design, safety, and engineering excellence. From the reimagined Sierra to the electric Tiago, Harrier, Curvv, and Nexon, Tata Motors continues to push boundaries with bold design, advanced technology, and superior comfort.

specifications.suspensionFront: MacPherson Strut suspension
specifications.suspensionRear: Rear twist beam
specifications.safetyFeatures: 7 Airbags, ABS with EBD, ESC, Front & Rear Parking Sensors, Rear Camera with Guidedlines, Touchscreen 14.52 Inch, Android Auto, Apple CarPlay, Alloy Wheels, LED DRLs, Panoramic Sunroof, Leatherette Upholstery, ISOFIX, Global NCAP Safety Rating 5 Star, Global NCAP Child Safety Rating 5 Star, Bharat NCAP Safety Rating 5 Star, Bharat NCAP Child Safety Rating 5 Star
